result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet IntervalCronGeneratorCLI.dll [arguments] [options]

Arguments:

  interval  <NUMBER>  
  The value of the interval

  unit      <UNITS>   
  The unit in seconds, minutes or hours
  Allowed values: Hour, Hours, HOUR, HOURS, hour, hours, Minute, Minutes, minute, minutes, MINUTE, MINUTES, Second, Seconds, second, seconds, SECOND, SECONDS

  command   <TEXT>    []
  The optional command to add to the end of the cron expression

Options:

  -s | --seconds  [False]
  Optional to use seconds. Defaults without.

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet IntervalCronGeneratorCLI.dll [arguments] [options]

Arguments:

  interval  <NUMBER>  
  The value of the interval

  unit      <UNITS>   
  The unit in seconds, minutes or hours
  Allowed values: Hour, Hours, HOUR, HOURS, hour, hours, Minute, Minutes, minute, minutes, MINUTE, MINUTES, Second, Seconds, second, seconds, SECOND, SECONDS

  command   <TEXT>    []
  The optional command to add to the end of the cron expression

Options:

  -s | --seconds  [False]
  Optional to use seconds. Defaults without.

staticCommands.name: convert
staticCommands.description: Converts the interval into a set of cron expressions

values.name: unit
values.description: The unit in seconds, minutes or hours

values.name: command
